text: Thank you for submitting the repair documentation. I've reviewed the recording and have a few follow-up questions to complete the quality assurance check.
Happy to answer any questions. What would you like to clarify?
During the repair, did you verify that the replacement part matches the specifications listed in the service manual? Specifically the voltage rating and model number.
Yes, I cross-referenced the part number against the service manual before installation. The voltage rating and model number both match the specifications.
Perfect. One last question — after completing the repair, did you run the full diagnostic cycle to confirm the system is operating within normal parameters?
Yes, I ran the full diagnostic suite. The system passed all tests and is now operating within normal parameters. No error codes are present.
Excellent work, technician. The QA check is complete. Your repair documentation has been logged and the job is ready to be marked as finished. Thank you for your thorough work.
Thank you for your guidance. Completing the job now.
